publishedAbstract: * MDS(s) in the Ceph cluster are read only state. ~~~ $ ceph health detail HEALTH_WARN 1 MDSs are read only; 1 MDSs behind on trimming [WRN] MDS_READ_ONLY: 1 MDSs are read only mds.ocs-storagecluster-cephfilesystem-a(mds.0): MDS in read-only mode ~~~ * MDS(s) are read only, after commit error on cache.dir(0x1) ~~~ 2023-01-10T14:13:44.740+0000 7ff49bbd6700-1 log_channel(cluster) log [ERR]: failed to commit dir 0x1 object, errno-22 2023-01-10T14:13:44.740+0000 7ff49bbd6700-1 mds.0.12345 unhandled write error (22) Invalid argument, force readonly... 2023-01-10T14:13:44.740+0000 7ff49bbd6700 1 mds.0.cache force file system read-only 2023-01-10T14:13:44.740+0000 7ff49bbd6700 0 log_channel(cluster) log [WRN]: force file system read-only 2023-01-10T14:13:44.740+0000 7ff49bbd6700 10 mds.0.server force_clients_readonly ~~~
publishedTitle: Ceph: MDS(s) are read only after logging "failed to commit dir 0x1 object, errno -22"
